name: Chandra Prakash Choudhary
profileSummary: Chandra Prakash Choudhary is an Indian politician and member of Lok Sabha from Giridih constituency. He is a senior vice president of AJSU party and a 3 time MLA from Ramgarh Vidhan Sabha constituency (2005–19). He has also served as a Minister for Water Resources in the Raghubar Das government.
